home.name: Isuru Edirisinghe.
home.description: Full Stack Software Engineer based in Lyon, France. I specialize in building scalable web applications, GenAI platforms, and cloud-native solutions with React, .NET, Python, and AWS/Azure.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm a Full Stack Software Engineer based in Lyon, France, with a track record of delivering high-impact solutions across healthcare, automotive, utilities, and supply chain industries. I build everything from GenAI platforms orchestrating multiple LLMs to real-time vehicle diagnostics systems.
about.p2_suffix: , I architected MEDASSIST — a unified GenAI platform orchestrating Mistral, GPT-4, and Claude with dynamic model switching. I also built MEDSOURCE, a lead sourcing engine that cut operational costs by 80%, saving the company EUR 100k annually.
about.p3_suffix: , I led the development and release of the Peugeot Motocycles Connect app on Google Play and the App Store, and built a diagnostic dashboard that reduced troubleshooting time by 70%.
about.p4_suffix: , I spearheaded the Vannmalerbytte app used by 300+ Norwegian municipalities, cutting water meter installation time by 15% and saving over EUR 1M annually.
about.p5: I hold an MSc. in IoT (with Honors) from the University of Bourgogne Franche-Comte and a BSc. in Computer Science from Uva Wellassa University.

entries.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Architected MEDASSIST, a unified GenAI platform orchestrating multiple LLMs (Mistral, GPT-4, Claude) with dynamic model switching, internet context enrichment, and advanced file processing
Engineered the MEDSOURCE lead sourcing engine, cutting operational costs by 80% and saving EUR 100k annually by eliminating external vendor dependencies
Enhanced the MEDFINANCE ecosystem with AI-driven invoice data extraction and automated notification workflows for billing cycles

entries.title: IT Development Engineer
highlights: Led the end-to-end development and release of the Peugeot Motocycles Connect app on Google Play and the Apple App Store, coordinating with global partners across China, India, and Italy
Built a real-time vehicle diagnostic dashboard, reducing troubleshooting time by 70%

entries.title: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
highlights: Developed the Vannmalerbytte app, used by 300+ Norwegian municipalities, reducing water meter installation time by 15% and saving EUR 1M annually
Increased team velocity by 20% as Scrum Master and optimized deployment processes with Azure ARM, reducing time by 30%

entries.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
highlights: Built scalable REST API services for Rorleggerdialog backend, improving data processing speed by 40%
Integrated Microsoft Graph API for user authentication, boosting engagement by 35% via social login
Delivered a PWA frontend, increasing mobile engagement by 25%

entries.title: Trainee Full Stack Software Engineer
highlights: Developed backend and frontend components for the Tracified blockchain platform, reducing product tracking errors by 30%
Automated infrastructure deployment, cutting deployment times by 40%
Specialized in IoT systems, embedded programming, and cloud computing
Master's thesis on connected vehicle diagnostics at Peugeot Motocycles
Focused on software engineering, algorithms, and data structures
Final year project on blockchain-based supply chain traceability (Tracified)

entries.title: MEDASSIST - GenAI Platform
entries.description: Unified GenAI platform orchestrating multiple LLMs (Mistral, GPT-4, Claude) with dynamic model switching, internet context enrichment, and advanced file processing capabilities.

entries.title: MEDSOURCE - Lead Sourcing Engine
entries.description: Automated lead sourcing engine that eliminated external vendor dependencies, cutting operational costs by 80% and saving EUR 100k annually for the company.

entries.title: Peugeot Motocycles Connect
entries.description: Next-generation mobile connectivity app for Peugeot two-wheelers, available on Google Play and the Apple App Store. Real-time vehicle telemetry, diagnostics, and ride tracking.

entries.title: Vannmalerbytte
entries.description: Water meter management platform used by 300+ municipalities in Norway. Reduced installation time by 15%, saving over EUR 1M annually.

entries.title: Rorleggerdialog
entries.description: Progressive Web Application for plumber coordination in Norway. Built scalable REST APIs improving data processing speed by 40% and integrated Microsoft Graph API authentication.

entries.title: Portfolio Website
entries.description: This personal portfolio built with React 19, Vite, MUI v7, and Framer Motion. Fully responsive dark-themed design with smooth animations.

entries.title: Change Maker Award
entries.description: Recognized for driving innovation and delivering impactful results across multiple projects.

entries.title: Merit Award
entries.issuer: National Best Quality Software Awards (NBQSA) Sri Lanka
entries.description: Awarded for outstanding software quality in the national competition.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Have a question, a project in mind, or just want to say hi? My inbox is always open. I'll do my best to get back to you!
